name: Имейл за искане на фактури + напомняне

assignments.name: email_body
assignments.value: =Здравейте, {{ $('Read clients').item.json.contact_name }},  Моля, изпратете фактурите на {{ $('Read clients').item.json.company_name }} за месец {{ $now.format('MMMM yyyy') }} до 7-мо число на месеца.  Благодаря предварително!  С уважение, Екипът на MV Accounting

assignments.name: email_body
assignments.value:
=Hello {{ $('Read clients').item.json.contact_name }},

Please send over the invoices for  {{ $('Read clients').item.json.company_name }}for {{ $now.format('MMMM yyyy') }} by the 7th of the month.

Thank you in advance!

Best regards,
MV Accounting

parameters.subject: =[MV Automation] Invoice request drafts ready — {{ $now.format('MMMM yyyy') }}
parameters.message: =Generated {{ $json.client_ids.length }} invoice request drafts in Gmail.  Run ID: {{ $json.client_ids[0] }}  Please review and send from the Drafts folder.

parameters.content:
## will be outlook
would also be great to send it with an html so it looks more presentabl

## will be outlook
this can be removed when we now it works

assignments.name: email_body
assignments.value:
=Здравейте,

Напомняме Ви за предишния ни имейл относно фактурите за месец {{ $now.format('MMMM yyyy') }}. Все още не сме получили документи от Вас.

Моля, изпратете ги при първа възможност, за да можем да обработим счетоводството Ви за месеца навреме.

Ако вече сте ги изпратили, моля игнорирайте този имейл.

С уважение,
Екипът на MV Accounting

assignments.name: email_body
assignments.value:
=Hello,

This is a reminder regarding our previous email about {{ $('loop').item.json.company_name }}'s invoices for {{ $now.format('MMMM yyyy') }}. We haven't received them yet.

Please send them over as soon as possible so we can process this month's accounting on time.

If you've already sent them, please ignore this message.

Best regards,
MV Accounting

parameters.subject: =[MV Automation] Reminder run complete — {{ $now.format('MMMM yyyy') }}
parameters.message: =Reminder run complete for {{ $json.run_id }}.  Total clients in run: {{ $json.total }} Already replied (no action needed): {{ $json.replied }} Reminder drafts created: {{ $json.reminders }} Uncategorized (please check): {{ $json.untouched }}  Please review reminder drafts in Gmail before sending.
